title: Blue Owl Anxiety Rattles the $1.8 Trillion Private Credit Market
description: Despite years of solid returns, direct lenders can't shake concerns about the once-niche corner of global finance.
content: Despite years of solid returns, direct lenders can't shake concerns about the once-niche corner of global finance.
